title: T-007 — Implement SET-003 First Warehouse step (warehouse create form)
prompt:
Implement step 2 form: First Warehouse creation (name, type, code).

PRD §14.3-14.4 SET-003: Form fields:
- Warehouse name (required, text)
- Warehouse type (required, select: finished|raw|components; default: finished)
- Warehouse code (required, text, unique)

Form submits to POST /api/v1/onboarding/step {step_number: 2, data: {name, type, code}} and creates warehouse in DB via backend.

Acceptance:
- Form validates required fields
- Type defaults to 'finished'
- Code is validated as unique (backend returns 422 if duplicate)
- Form submission updates onboarding_state.current_step to 3
- Navigate to step 3 (SET-004) on success

Test: RED test verifies warehouse is created in DB with correct attributes.

pipeline_inputs.description: Step 2 RHF form: First Warehouse creation
pipeline_inputs.details: Create FirstWarehouseStep component using React Hook Form + Zod schema. Fields: (1) name: text input, required, minLength 1, maxLength 100. (2) type: select dropdown, required, options: [finished, raw, components], default 'finished'. (3) code: text input, required, pattern ^[A-Z0-9_]{3,20}$, backend validates uniqueness. Form validation: name/code required, type defaults to finished. Submit button calls POST /api/v1/onboarding/step with step_number=2 and form data (backend creates warehouse record and updates onboarding_state). On success, navigate to step 3 (SET-004). Show loading state. Handle error if code is duplicate (show error message).
out_of_scope: warehouse type enum definition (assume exists in schema)
warehouse CRUD endpoints beyond onboarding context
acceptance_criteria: Given step 2 form is rendered, when user enters name='Main Warehouse', type='finished', code='MAIN', then all fields show values and type defaults correctly
Given form with code='MAIN' submitted twice, when second submit occurs, then API returns 422 with duplicate code error
Given valid warehouse data submitted, when form submits, then warehouse record is created in DB and onboarding_state.current_step becomes 3
test_strategy: Write e2e test: test_warehouse_form_submission() fills form and verifies warehouse creation in DB
Write e2e test: test_warehouse_code_uniqueness() attempts to create duplicate code and verifies error
Verify warehouse appears in /api/v1/warehouses list after step 2 completes
risk_red_lines: Do not allow code values outside the ^[A-Z0-9_]{3,20}$ pattern
Do not proceed to step 3 if warehouse creation fails
